category_sources: source_facts.description says Changie is an automated changelog tool for releases; official README describes file-based changelog management and release notes separated from commit messages.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README use Changie; source_facts.name is changie.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site; official GitHub README says user documentation is available on changie.dev and links to guide/configuration resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/miniscruff/changie; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README topics/features identify changelog management, release automation, devops, CI/CD, Go, and a CLI focus.
